name: Paramount Gold Nevada Corp.
business: The company acquires, explores, and develops precious metal projects in Nevada and Oregon. It has not yet earned revenue from mining operations. Its activities include permitting at the Grassy Mountain Project and reclamation at the Sleeper mine.

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the business of acquiring, exploring and developing precious metal projects in the United States of America.

catalysts.event: TRT approval of Environmental Evaluation for Grassy Mountain
catalysts.sentence: The State of Oregon's Technical Review Team ("TRT") approved the completion of the Environmental Evaluation ("EE") for the Grassy Mountain project.
